_comment: Realistic GET /emails/<id> shape for the Stripo→Braze export bridge's CSS-inlining path. The visual class rules (.es-button, .es-p-default) live ONLY in the separate `css` field, as Stripo really returns them; the `html` carries Stripo's own <head> resets + an Outlook conditional block that must survive inlining untouched. The bridge must inline the css onto the elements (Stripo-native match) and keep only the un-inlinable @media/pseudo/@font-face in <head>.
html:
Connect Xero

Hi {{ profile.first_name | default: 'there' }}, your invoices are waiting.
title: Invoices still piling up
name: M10 Xero B - Free
